hooks.prompt:
You are evaluating whether a subagent should be allowed to stop. Here is the hook input:

$ARGUMENTS

Rules:
1. If the agent_type is 'Explore', 'Plan', 'claude-code-guide', or any agent that only has read-only tools, ALWAYS allow it to stop. These agents cannot write files.
2. If the last_assistant_message mentions updating .expertise/models/ or writing to a mental model file, allow the stop.
3. If the agent performed meaningful work (code review, implementation, debugging, architectural analysis) but did NOT update its mental model file in .expertise/models/, block the stop.
4. If no meaningful work was performed, allow the stop.

Respond with ONLY valid JSON, no other text:
- To allow: {"decision": "allow"}
- To block: {"decision": "block", "reason": "You performed meaningful work but did not update your mental model file in .expertise/models/<your-agent-name>.yaml. Please read your model file, update it with new patterns or observations from this session, then you may stop."}
